description: Charlie Kirk the American Hero (KIRK) is the FIRST American memorial token launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — honoring Charlie Kirk’s enduring patriotism, courage, and leadership. KIRK symbolizes the spirit of freedom, faith, and truth that uplifts generations, standing forever as a tribute to American heroism across America and Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Charlie Kirk the American Hero
